title: Moon Camera - Resource Pack for Mortuusars Exposure Mod
description: This is a retexture of the camera model from Mortuusars Exposure Mod. It's inspired by the  Hasselblad 500 El Data Camera used on the Moon
body:
![Steve holding a medium format camera with a white body and black and orange accents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecced5ecaa61b33c9b28f893a7aebe5eec21ff0f.jpeg) This is a retexture of the camera model from **[Mortuusars Exposure Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)**. It is inspired by the Hasselblad 500 El Data Camera used on the moon. 

**Original Mod Creator** - [https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars](https://modrinth.com/user/mortuusars)

**Exposure Mod** - [https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)
